{{Quote|All pilots, keep clear of these things. They pack a wallop!|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
The '''slayer ship''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] starfighter created for the use of [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]]'s [[Slayers]] in the final year of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Characteristics==
In appearance, the Slayer ships were made up of three [[yorik coral]] triangles, joined from apex to base. The leading two had mica-like canopies, while the third and largest had a "tail" at the back, possibly to complement [[dovin basal]] propulsion.

Such dovin basals enabled the ship to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], a feat that standard coralskippers lacked; while the singularity defense could swallow four times the incoming attacks a normal coralskipper could deal with.

In six extensions on each side of the ship were held [[Yaret-Kor|yaret-kors]]. One direct hit of plasma from such a ship could reduce a fully charged [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter|XJ3 X-wing]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] down to fifty percent.

==History==
Developed by [[Master Shaper]] [[Qelah Kwaad]], the vessel was the Yuuzhan Vong analog of a heavy assault fighter. The vessels were also larger than the standard [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]], and some possessed passenger compartments.

The vessel's appearance reminded some members of [[Twin Suns Squadron]] of an [[Azuran stingcrawler]]—stingcrawler thus became the pilot slang to identify them—but Twin Suns leader [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] felt they bore more resemblance to the [[voxyn]], creatures [[Shaping protocol|shaped]] to hunt [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

While their design similarity to the voxyn may have been accidental, it is possible that [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] purposefully gave the Slayers exclusive use of the vessel as an insult to the Jedi, as the Slayers were shaped specifically to fight the Jedi. However, rumors indicated the Slayer ships were indeed created with voxyn genes, in order to give them rudimentary [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]].<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
